PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?series(SUM(?attendance) AS ?total) WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P31 wd:Q268461 ; wdt:P186 wd:Q504309 ; wdt:P773 ?attendance ; wdt:P178 ?series .
}
GROUP BY ?series
ORDER BY ?total
OFFSET 1
LIMIT 1
